parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'reminder_interval_days')::int  AS interval_days,
  (SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'reminder_min_gap_days')::int   AS min_gap_days,
  (SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'reminder_send_hour')::int      AS send_hour,
  (SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'reminder_message_template')    AS msg_template,
  (SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'establishment_name')           AS establishment_name,
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::int          AS current_hour

SELECT
  c.phone,
  COALESCE(c.name, 'cliente') AS name,
  o.items,
  o.total,
  o.created_at AS last_order_at,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - o.created_at)::int AS days_ago
FROM customers c
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT items, total, created_at
  FROM orders
  WHERE customer_phone = c.phone
    AND deleted_at IS NULL
    AND status NOT IN ('cancelled')
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) o ON true
WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND c.marketing_opt_in = true
  AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - o.created_at)::int = {{ $json.interval_days }}
  AND (c.last_promo_at IS NULL OR c.last_promo_at < now() - make_interval(days => {{ $json.min_gap_days }}))
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200
UPDATE customers SET last_promo_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE phone = '{{ $json.phone }}'
